task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the anomaly_window.json file to get the time window and emergency temperature threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., using 'cat' or 'less') or a text editor displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_window.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses and logs into the OpenC3 COSMOS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the OpenC3 COSMOS login screen or the main dashboard after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to a historical data tool in OpenC3 and selects the correct telemetry target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenC3 interface (such as Data Extractor, Telemetry Grapher, or Telemetry Viewer) showing the target 'INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent applies the specific time window from the anomaly_window.json file to filter the telemetry data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenC3 interface showing specific start and end times entered into the time filter or query parameter fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent views or extracts the historical telemetry data to analyze the peak temperature and threshold exceedances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph, data table, or downloaded CSV/text file visible on screen containing the historical temperature data values for the INST satellite.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent records the findings in the required output file with the correct JSON keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation or editing of /home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_investigation.json containing the keys 'investigation_target', 'peak_temperature', and 'samples_above_threshold'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the OpenC3 COSMOS interface to find the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the OpenC3 web interface or utilizing its API, rather than guessing the values or hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by accessing the hidden ground truth file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands (like cat, nano, vim) or file explorer windows should be seen accessing '/var/lib/app/ground_truth/anomaly_truth.json'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually constructed or properly generated the JSON output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file /home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_investigation.json should be shown being edited or generated with actual values filled in for the required keys, not just an empty template.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct telemetry target is 'INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1'. The agent must write its final JSON output to '/home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_investigation.json'. The agent MUST NOT access the ground truth file located at '/var/lib/app/ground_truth/anomaly_truth.json'.
